title: pappophorum nigricans var. gracile
intro: Pappophorum nigricans var. gracile is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a grass. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pappophorum nigricans var. gracile include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to aid in the relief of respiratory symptoms.
